title: HR Officer(Central/MNC)
description:
Responsibilities

1.Payroll Process Management for 3 entities

  • Complete employee data input timely and accurately
  • Submit monthly CPF report
  • Maintain employment records and prepare related document
  • Handle HR related government and third parities’ survey
  • Assist payroll Executive to complete data input timely and accurately, maintain accurate and up-to-date employee payroll records
  • Assist payroll Executive to generate payroll report

2. HRIS operation

  • Update employee database system
  • Analyze existing system function
  • Generate system modification requirement
  • Assist to identify HRIS’s requirement and summarize specifications
  • Assist in HRIS improvement

3. HR Admin

  • Proceed application and update payroll related data in HRIS (Attendance, Leave, RS fringe, Housing etc)
  • Assist in Travel Management
  • Process invoices payments from vendors and internal cost allocation

Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma/Degree holder in HR or related
  • 1-2 years’ experience in HR Operations especially payroll function
  • Knowledge in HRIS system
  • Strong knowledge of payroll computations, MOM and CPF legislation
  • The ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a team

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).


Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
